Men's Basketball Schedule Roster Stats Story Archives Questionnaire Record Book Additional Links

2025-26 Men's Basketball Roster

Larryn Rooks

1 Jackson Thoele

  • Position Guard
  • Height 6-6
  • Class Junior
  • Hometown Frisco, Texas
  • Highschool Lebanon Trail HS
  • Bio
  • Stats

Biography

2025-26:
Started the first three games of the season before suffering a season-ending injury … Averaged 15.67 points and 5.67 rebounds per game while shooting 83.3% from the line … Had career-highs of 22 points and seven rebounds against MSU Denver (Nov. 17) … Fall 2025 Lone Star Conference Commissioner’s Honor Roll.

2024-25:
Redshirt.

Lamar State (2023-24):
Played in 30 games, drawing the start in 21 … Averaged 7.70 points and 6.47 rebounds per game with 16 blocked shots … Had eight double figure scoring games with a career-high of 24 vs. Lone Star College-Tomball (Jan. 3) … Helped the Seahawks qualify for the Region XIV Tournament.

Adams State (2021-23):
Played two year … In 2022-23, helped the Skyhawks win the RMAC Tournament to qualify for nationals.

Lebanon Trail High School:
As a senior was all-conference first team, all-defense first team and All-Academic ... Scored over 1000 points and is the Trail Blazers all-time leading rebounder and scorer.

Statistics

Season Statistics

Season Statistics

Career Statistics

There are no statistics available for this player.
